ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Associated Alcohols & Breweries Limited (AABL) has strategically launched "Kultur," a new hard seltzer brand, in Madhya Pradesh, signaling its entry into India's high-growth ready-to-drink (RTD) beverage market. This move aligns with AABL's premiumisation strategy, targeting Gen Z and millennial consumers, and aims to diversify its product portfolio into a segment projected to grow significantly (hard seltzers >10% CAGR, RTDs ~18% CAGR). While representing a material step towards market expansion and innovation, the immediate financial impact and investment details of this launch are not quantified within the announcement.
